gameSessionDisplay.mapDescription: Every year it comes. The Dream Walk. The adults all gather at the edge of the wood and usher the youngsters into the darkness of the Lost Lands. The texts left behind by the Gods tell us that the young people who travel into the wood will encounter the characters, creatures, and spirits who will guide them into adulthood. If they manage to make it through the Lost Lands alive they do so as adults. This year, finally, is our year. We hug our parents, clasp our hands together, and we embark.
